title: Core Elements of the Ethereum Blockchain
description: A visual breakdown of the fundamental components that make up the Ethereum blockchain, showing their hierarchical structure and relationships.
relationships: Transactions are signed by and update Accounts
Transactions are bundled into a Block
The Block Header cryptographically links to the previous block
The World State is the global state of all accounts, updated by executing Transactions in the EVM
Smart Contract code is stored in Contract Accounts and executed by the EVM
Consensus validates and adds new Blocks to the chain
